### Post by raleigh3 on 2020-08-21
I having been using the hosts file from mvps hosts.

They went to 0.0.0.0 instead of 127.0.0.1 because of a conflict with Windows 8.1.

Is my host file working or do I need to change all of them to 0.0.0.0 ?

```
# [Start of entries generated by MVPS HOSTS]
#
# [Misc A - Z]
0.0.0.0 crt.livejasmin.com
0.0.0.0 https://crt.livejasmin.com
0.0.0.0 fr.a2dfp.net
0.0.0.0 mfr.a2dfp.net
```

---

### Post by HermanAB on 2020-08-22
It will work as is.

However, since I usually have a few other things in my hosts file, I append the above kind of thing to my existing hosts file with cat.

---

### Post by rbmorse on 2020-08-23
I've been using the MPVS hosts for years, never had an issue with it. I use the Ubuntu defaults rather than those included in the MVPS file/

### Post by raleigh3 on 2020-08-24
You can add sites that you do not want to open up in your browser.

[http://accs-net.com/hosts/benefits_restrictions.html](http://accs-net.com/hosts/benefits_restrictions.html)
